verification.verification_notes: Excel generated from dual-source (PDF + markdown). Merged cells documented in annotations. Awaiting SME verification. JSON regenerated per EXCEL_TO_JSON_PROMPT v2.3.0.

extraction_metadata.extraction_notes: Main SoA table spanning pages 18-21. 3 header rows, 29 activity rows, 10 schedule columns + Notes column (excluded from grid, contents decomposed to annotations). Subsidiary tables (PK/Immunogenicity Flow Chart pp22-23, Biomarker Flow Chart p24) extracted to Excel only. Source_note annotations consolidated by unique text — one annotation per section reference, multiple marker_locations.

table_metadata.table_purpose: Complete study schedule covering Screening, Treatment (Cycle 1 and Cycle 2+), End of Treatment, Post-Treatment Safety Follow-up, and Survival Follow-up
table_metadata.notes: Single logical table spanning 4 PDF pages. Two section headers (Laboratory Assessments, Disease Assessment) group child activities. Three subsidiary tables (PK/Immunogenicity Flow Chart pp22-23, Biomarker Flow Chart p24) are referenced from activity rows via 'See Flow Chart' values.

schedule_properties.property_comment: Major study phases: Screening, Treatment Phase, End of Treatment (EOT), Post Treatment Follow-up Phase. Label column contains 'Evaluation' (the row label header). Synthesized as 'Epoch'. Distinguishes the 4 major phase groupings across columns.

Sub-phase breakdown: Cycle 1 / Cycle 2 and Beyond under Treatment; Safety follow-up Period / Survival follow-up under Post Treatment. Without this row, Cycle 1 and Cycle 2+ columns would be indistinguishable at epoch level. Classified as cycle because treatment is organised by cycles.

Specific timing within each period: D-28 to D-15, D-14 to D-1 (Screening); D1(±1), D8(±1), D15(±1) (Cycle 1); D1(±2) (Cycle 2+); 30/60/90 days post-last-IMP (follow-up); Every 90 days (survival). This row makes each column unique — removing it would leave Cycle 1's three columns indistinguishable.

schedule_columns.composite_label: Screening (up to 28 days before Day 1) / D-28 to D-15

annotations.annotation_text: Women of child bearing potential must have a negative serum pregnancy test result within 7 days prior to first IMP administration.
evaluation not applicable for Cohort E
Informed Consent: Informed consent may be signed prior to D -28.
